Open Work

  • Let the five-trading-day Phase 1 soak, active-market 72-hour bar-continuity gate, and separate 96-hour process/code-freeze gate continue.
  • Keep the passive spread logger running until measured-cost coverage reaches the required observed days.
  • Keep Phase 2 in preparation mode only; no paper-mode implementation until readiness is PASS.
  • Continue independent candidate research without tuning rejected v0 hypotheses.
  • Keep dry-run and permission-lock safety audits green.

Primary Artifacts

  • Agent handoff
  • Phase 0 verdict
  • Rejected candidate audit
  • Frequency-normalized concentration audit
  • Fixed-notional cost report
  • Measured cost model
  • Phase 1 status summary
  • Phase 1 acceptance
  • Phase 2 readiness
